titleStmt.title: SII 9.515: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 515. (A.R. No. 288 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT CHATNAHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1446, Svabhānu, Kārtika, śu. 12, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1524 November 7, Monday. The inscription refers itself to the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Visaṇa-Rāvutta, son of Murāri-Rāvutta of Āriya-Kshatriya-kula, Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā made a grant of Chaṭanahaḷḷi in Kaviḷichervina-sīme, a sub-division of Uchchaṅgi-Vēṇṭhe under his nāyakatana, to Nārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭa, son of Dēvaru-Bhaṭṭa of Gautamagōtra, Baudhāyana-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā, free of all taxes, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivā
hanaśakavaruṣa 1446 naya saṁda vartamāna sva
bhānusaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 12 sōmavāradalu śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
kṛṣṇarāyamahārāyaru varnadhar(ṁ)maṁgaḷa
nū pratipālisi pṛthvīrājyaṁgeyiUtta yira
lū Āriyakṣatriyakulada kāśyapagōtrada
rukuśākheya Āślāyanasūtrada murārirāutta
ra makkaḷu visaṇarāuttarū gautamagōtrada
yajuśākheya bahudhāṁnyasūtrada dēva
rubhaṭara makaḷu nārāyaṇabhaṭṭarige
koṭa dānapaṭeya kramaveṁttendare śrīma(ṁ)nmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīkruṣṇarāyamahārāyarū namage nāya
katanake pālisida Uccaṁgiya vēṁṭheyake sa
luva kaviḷicervina sīmeya voḷagaṇa caṭa
nahaḷiya grāmavanū nāu nimage dhāreya
neṟadu koṭevāgi śrīmatu Āriyakṣatriya
kulada kāśyapagōtrada Āślāyanasūtra
rukuśākheya murārirāuttara makaḷu
visaṇarāuttarū gautamagōtrada bahu
dhāṁnyasūtrada yajuśākheya dēva
rubhaṭara makaḷu nārāyaṇabhaṭṭari
ge kruṣṇarāyamahārāyarige pu(ṁ)
ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu Uththānadvādaśi
kāladalū tuṁgabhadrātīradali
hariharanāthadēvara saṁni
dhiyalū sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadāna
dhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreyaṁ
neṟadu koṭevāgi Ā grāmake
saluvaṁthā maṇeyapākevoḷa
gāda vāra suṁka taḷavārike
grāmavarttanenāḍasēnabō
vike heggāru marana guttage hēru gāṇa
teru Uṁṭāda maṇeyapāka
grāmake saluva catusīmeya voḷagaṇa kā
ḍāraṁbha nīrāraṁbha Aṇe
Acugaṭṭu sakala suvar(ṁ)ṇādāya sa
kala kārāya modalāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pā
śāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁ
ba Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmya sarvau
sahitavāgi dhāreyanerradu koṭavāgi
śrīmatu Āriyakṣatriyakulada kā
śyapagōtrada murārirāuttara makkaḷu visaṇa
rāuttaru gautamagōtrada yajuśākheya
dēvarubhaṭara makaḷu nārāyaṇabhaṭarige
dhānakrutavāgi dhāreyanerradu koṭevāgi
nimma putra pautrapāraṁpareyāgi Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyigaḷāgi dānādhikrayayōgyavā
da sukhadalū Anubhavisūdū yeṁdu ko
ṭa dānapaṭṭe yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu Ā
dityacaṁdrāvanilōnaḷaśca deUbhū
mirājā hṛdayaṁ yamaśca A
haśca rātriśca Ubhēca saṁdhyā dharma
śca jānāti narasya jittaṁ . dā
napālanayōrmadhyē dānātsēyō
nrupālanaṁ . dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanāda
ccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattādviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ . paradatāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē
sarvēśāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . nunyabhōjyā
(ṁ)na karagrāhya(ṁ) vipradattā vasuṁdhara . sva
datā paradattaṁ vā yō harētevaśaṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi yiṣṭānāṁ jā
yatē krime . kar(ṁ)mmigaḷa voppa śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.515 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
